query:
INSERT INTO posthog_cohortpeople (person_id, cohort_id, version)
        SELECT pid, $1, $3
        FROM UNNEST($2::bigint[]) AS t(pid)
        WHERE NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM posthog_cohortpeople cp
            WHERE cp.person_id = pid AND cp.cohort_id = $1
        )
        ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
